<@733681322081517581> I just found out now you using alt account. have you seen the messages above? check it please.

We received the post above, and we sincerely thank you for your suggestions — we will carefully consider the feedback shared there.

We have always valued our Korean-speaking community deeply, and we are truly grateful for the contributions made by our Korean volunteer translators. Regarding volunteer recruitment, we do have plans to bring on more Korean translation volunteers, but please give us a little more time to select the right people for the role.
Hi, we've received this message and will discuss it with the team. Thank you for taking the time to share your suggestions.
